name: Coterie Insurance API for Small Business
what_it_does: Coterie REST API for small business commercial insurance embedded platform. Enables AI agents to manage Business Owner Policy (BOP), general liability, and professional liability quote and bind automation for small businesses, handle real-time insurance eligibility and appetite check for business class acceptance, access instant quote generation based on business type, location, and revenue data, retrieve policy issuance and certificate of insurance generation, manage policy endorsement and cancellation workflows, handle premium calculation and payment processing for commercial policies, access policy status and renewal management for ongoing coverage, retrieve loss run and claims data for renewal underwriting, manage agent and broker appointment and commission data, and integrate small business insurance with business formation, payroll, and fintech platforms for embedded insurance.
use_cases: Embedding insurance quotes in business formation platforms from fintech agents
Automating small business insurance binding from broker agents
Generating certificates of insurance from vendor management agents
Integrating commercial insurance with payroll platforms from HR agents
not_for: Large enterprise commercial insurance without small business appetite and automation focus
Personal lines without commercial small business insurance context
Complex specialty insurance without BOP and general liability focus
best_when: A fintech, broker, or platform using Coterie wants AI agents to automate small business insurance quoting, binding, policy management, and certificate generation through embedded insurance workflows.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Insurance binding automation must comply with state insurance regulations and carrier appetite rules — automated binding outside appetite parameters generates policies that may be non-renewed or rescinded. Certificate of insurance generation must accurately reflect coverage; incorrect COIs create liability for the generator.

auth.notes: Coterie uses API key authentication. Per-partner API credentials. Documentation at docs.coterieinsurance.com. Webhooks for policy lifecycle events. REST API with JSON responses. Instant quoting API for embedded insurance distribution. Available in 50 US states. Agent and MGA distribution model. Backed by American Family Insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for development; production requires partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based for agent distribution; per-policy fee for platform embedding
pricing.notes: Cincinnati, Ohio. Founded 2018. Private (American Family Insurance investment). Small business commercial insurance API market. National appetite in 50 states. BOP, GL, and Professional Liability focus. API-first distribution for embedded insurance. Known for instant quoting and binding speed. Competes with Next Insurance and Hiscox for small business commercial insurance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: Automated binding must comply with state insurance regulations; binding outside carrier appetite triggers non-renewal; validate eligibility before binding
Appetite check first — always call eligibility/appetite endpoint before quote; automated quoting for ineligible business classes returns quotes that cannot bind
COI accuracy critical — certificate of insurance generation must reflect actual policy coverages; incorrect COIs create legal liability for the issuing party
State availability — Coterie has national appetite but some coverages and classes may be limited by state; verify state-specific eligibility before embedding
Partner agreement required — production API access requires Coterie partner agreement; review distribution and compliance requirements in partner agreement before automating
Premium payment flow — premium payment must be collected and remitted per state premium finance and carrier requirements; implement compliant payment workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial insurance API. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Small business policy and premium data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Embedded insurance. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US. Commercial insurance policy data.
